title: MANGA NGE Which is your favorite frame
display_title: MANGA NGE Which is your favorite frame
wikitext:
[]: [NGE] Which is your favorite frame?             Quote Post by Ryo » Mon Mar 07, 2005 5:33 pm I'm just wondering... Wich is your very favorite frame in the EVA manga? Post it, provide link, or just explain wich one it is. This one is mine: Pure genious.

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Mon Mar 07, 2005 5:39 pm Rei smiling up at Shinji. Of course, I'd much rather say "just about every shot of giant Rei-Lilith", but Sadamoto is a lazy bastard. :P

[]:             Quote Post by anatrok » Mon Mar 07, 2005 5:45 pm Hmm, I have to go with Asuka pinching Shinji, in vol, four. Love that part.

[]:             Quote Post by Ryo » Mon Mar 07, 2005 5:47 pm But it looks... so... painful. :cry:

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE 01 » Mon Mar 07, 2005 6:28 pm don't know about frame but the page with Misato and Kaji's last kiss and he gives her that sad look just before the door closes then her reaction at the bottom of the page... man even I was kinda teared up also in volume 9 when Kaowru sticks his head in the womens bathroom that Asukas in. i thought he was kinda a bastard in the begining of the volume but that scene brought back some of the childlike innocence that I think makes Kaowru such an appealling character

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Mon Mar 07, 2005 10:28 pm Shinji my man you are in for it

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Tue Mar 08, 2005 7:15 am Two of my faves..Though Asuka is the character i like most Rei is just so cute at these scenes: [URL=http://img93.exs.cx/my.php?loc=img93&image=018ry.jpg] [/URL] [URL=http://img93.exs.cx/my.php?loc=img93&image=024rh.jpg] [/URL]

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Mar 08, 2005 1:42 pm the_seventh_child wrote: Two of my faves..Though Asuka is the character i like most Rei is just so cute at these scenes:

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Tue Mar 08, 2005 8:01 pm Mr. Tines wrote: the_seventh_child wrote: Two of my faves..Though Asuka is the character i like most Rei is just so cute at these scenes:

[]:             Quote Post by Ryo » Wed Mar 09, 2005 8:36 am It doesn't work anymore... :(

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Wed Mar 09, 2005 8:40 am Here comes another: [URL=http://img160.exs.cx/my.php?loc=img160&image=034zl.jpg] [/URL] [URL=http://img160.exs.cx/my.php?loc=img160&image=047kv.jpg] [/URL]

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Wed Mar 09, 2005 9:10 am DatDude wrote: Mr. Tines wrote: the_seventh_child wrote: Two of my faves..Though Asuka is the character i like most Rei is just so cute at these scenes:

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Mar 09, 2005 9:42 am DatDude wrote: Yes mom [/sarcasm]

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Thu Mar 10, 2005 9:44 am Reichu wrote: You know, on some forums, you can get banned for sassing at a mod.

[]:             Quote Post by Sectre01 » Thu Mar 10, 2005 10:57 pm ROFL that isn't from the actual manga is it?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Mar 11, 2005 2:04 pm Sectre01 wrote: ROFL that isn't from the actual manga is it?

[]:             Quote Post by Soluzar » Fri Mar 11, 2005 3:10 pm Mr. Tines wrote: Sectre01 wrote: ROFL that isn't from the actual manga is it?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Mar 11, 2005 3:36 pm Soluzar wrote: I can't let you get away with that, Mr. Tines! ;)

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Fri Mar 11, 2005 4:41 pm Soluzar wrote: I think that page fits in perfectly with the story, and is a sequence that Anno might have included in the anime but for the toss of a coin. That's the Asuka/Shinji relationship in a nutshell. Asuka desparately wants Shinji to be assertive and to declare his desire for her openly. Shinji reacts with fear or aparrent indifference, and Asuka feels rejected, so she strikes out at him with her words, and withdraws. That's the whole complicated dynamic there on one page... genius!
